children.heading: Circular economy
children.label: 1 Circular economy
children.text: The term “circular economy” has the meaning given such term in .section 4201 of this title

children.heading: Coastal shoreline community
children.label: 2 Coastal shoreline community
children.text: The term “coastal shoreline community” means a city or county directly adjacent to the open ocean, major estuaries, or the Great Lakes.

children.heading: EPA Administrator
children.label: 3 EPA Administrator
children.text: The term “EPA Administrator” has the meaning given such term in .section 4201 of this title

children.heading: Indian Tribe
children.label: 4 Indian Tribe
children.text: The term “Indian Tribe” has the meaning given that term in .section 5304 of title 25

children.heading: Interagency Committee
children.label: 5 Interagency Committee
children.text: The term “Interagency Committee” means the Interagency Marine Debris Coordinating Committee established under .section 1954 of this title

children.heading: Marine debris
children.label: 6 Marine debris
children.text: The term “marine debris” means any persistent solid material that is manufactured or processed and directly or indirectly, intentionally or unintentionally, disposed of or abandoned into the marine environment or the Great Lakes.

children.heading: MARPOL; Annex V; Convention
children.label: 7 MARPOL; Annex V; Convention
children.text: The terms “MARPOL”, “Annex V”, and “Convention” have the meaning given those terms under .section 1901(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a State;

children.label: B
children.text: an Indian Tribe;

children.label: C
children.text: a territory of the United States;

children.label: D
children.text: one or more units of local governments or Tribal organizations;

children.label: E
children.text: a foreign government;

children.label: F
children.text: a private for-profit entity;

children.label: G
children.text: a nonprofit organization; or

children.label: H
children.text: a private individual.

children.heading: Nonprofit organization
children.label: 9 Nonprofit organization
children.text: The term “nonprofit organization” has the meaning given such term in .section 4201 of this title

children.heading: Post consumer materials management
children.label: 10 Post consumer materials management
children.text: The term “post-consumer materials management” has the meaning given such term in .section 4201 of this title

children.heading: Program
children.label: 11 Program
children.text: The term “Program” means the Marine Debris Program established under section 1952 of this title.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Severe marine debris event
children.label: 12 Severe marine debris event
children.text: The term “severe marine debris event” means atypically large amounts of marine debris caused by a natural disaster, including a tsunami, flood, landslide, or hurricane, or other source.

children.label: A
children.text: any State of the United States that is impacted by marine debris within its seaward or Great Lakes boundaries;

children.label: B
children.text: Indian Tribe;

children.label: C
children.text: the District of Columbia;

children.label: D
children.text: American Samoa, Guam, the Northern Mariana Islands, Puerto Rico, and the Virgin Islands; and

children.label: E
children.text: any other territory or possession of the United States, or separate sovereign in free association with the United States, that is impacted by marine debris within its seaward boundaries.

children.heading: Tribal Government
children.label: 14 Tribal Government
children.text: The term “Tribal Government” means the recognized governing body of any Indian or Alaska Native Tribe, band, nation, pueblo, village, community, component band, or component reservation, individually identified (including parenthetically) in the list published most recently as of , pursuant to .December 26, 2025section 5131 of title 25

children.heading: Tribal organization
children.label: 15 Tribal organization
children.text: The term “Tribal organization” has the meaning given the term in .section 5304 of title 25

children.heading: Under Secretary
children.label: 16 Under Secretary
children.text: The term “Under Secretary” has the meaning given such term in .section 4201 of this title
